string.name: what_s_new_latest
string.font:
🌟 Navigation Improvements: Moved Settings to the Files screen overflow menu for a cleaner interface. 
🌟 Localization Updates: Added full support for the Galician language. 
🌟 Themed Icon Support: Added monochrome launcher icon for Android 13+ themed icons. 
🌟 Performance & Stability: General optimizations and internal cleanups for a smoother experience.
